name: query-metasound-summary
description: Summarize a MetaSound Source asset, including graph inputs, outputs, interfaces, and optional default graph nodes/edges.

name: create-metasound-source
description: Create a MetaSound Source asset through the official MetaSound Source Builder, with optional v1 graph inputs and output format.

name: edit-metasound-graph
description: Perform restricted v1 MetaSound Source graph edits via the official builder API: graph I/O, class-name nodes, connections, input defaults, and layout.

name: set-metasound-input-defaults
description: Batch set default values for existing MetaSound Source graph inputs. V1 supports bool/int32/float/string defaults.
